subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qábl-i-Husayn! Hold thou fast unto this sure and consummate Word, which is even as a life-giving sea unto them that thirst [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محمد قبل حسین باینکلمه متقنه که بمنزله بحر حیوانست از برای تشنگان متمسک باش
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @symbolism
